header.title: Dropdown Menu
header.subtitle: A floating menu of actions triggered by a button. Supports keyboard navigation, disabled items, destructive actions, and labeled sections. Renders in a portal for reliable z-index stacking.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: DropdownMenu clones the trigger element to inject aria props, then portals the menu container to document.body.

parts.trigger: The element that opens the menu. Receives aria-haspopup and aria-expanded automatically.
parts.separator: A visual divider between groups of items.
parts.label: A non-interactive heading that groups items.

basic.title: Basic example
basic.description: A simple menu with a few actions.

withSections.title: With sections
withSections.description: Use DropdownMenuLabel and DropdownMenuSeparator to organize items into groups.

destructive.title: Destructive item
destructive.description: Use destructive prop on items that perform irreversible actions.

disabled.title: Disabled item
disabled.description: Disabled items are visible but not interactive. They are skipped during keyboard navigation.

alignRight.title: Align right
alignRight.description: Use align=right to open the menu anchored to the right edge of the trigger.

keyboard.title: Keyboard navigation
keyboard.description: Full keyboard support is built in.

scrollable.title: Inside scrollable container
scrollable.description: The menu tracks its trigger's position during scroll. Open a menu and scroll the container — the menu follows.

keyboard.arrowDownDesc: Move focus to the next item
keyboard.arrowUpDesc: Move focus to the previous item
keyboard.homeDesc: Move focus to the first item
keyboard.endDesc: Move focus to the last item
keyboard.escapeDesc: Close the menu and return focus to the trigger

menu.trigger: The element that opens the menu. aria-haspopup and aria-expanded are injected automatically.
menu.align: Which edge of the trigger the menu aligns to.
menu.onOpenChange: Called when the open state should change.
menu.className: Additional classes on the menu container.

item.onClick: Handler called when the item is activated.
item.destructive: Styles the item in the error color to indicate a dangerous action.
item.disabled: Prevents interaction and skips the item during keyboard navigation.

props.extendsNote: DropdownMenuItem renders as a native button. DropdownMenuSeparator and DropdownMenuLabel accept no props beyond className.
